---
title: "Presentations"
description-meta: "Research presentations by Matías Deneken."
page-navigation: true
toc: false
page-layout: full
format:
  html:
    title-block: false
---

```{=html}
<div class="coming-soon-shell">
  <header class="page-header-minimal" data-lang="en">
    <h1 class="page-title-minimal">Presentations</h1>
  </header>

  <header class="page-header-minimal" data-lang="es" style="display:none;">
    <h1 class="page-title-minimal">Presentaciones</h1>
  </header>

  <section class="page-wrap">
    <div class="page-content">
      <div class="coming-soon-container">
        <div class="coming-soon-box">
          <p class="coming-soon-text" data-lang="en">Coming soon</p>
          <p class="coming-soon-text" data-lang="es" style="display:none;">Próximamente</p>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </section>
</div>

<style>
.coming-soon-shell {
  max-width: 1200px;
  margin: 0 auto;
  padding: 2rem 1rem;
}

.coming-soon-container {
  min-height: 400px;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
}

.coming-soon-box {
  background: linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(139, 124, 248, 0.08) 0%, rgba(244, 114, 182, 0.08) 100%);
  border: 1px solid rgba(139, 124, 248, 0.2);
  border-radius: 12px;
  padding: 4rem 3rem;
  text-align: center;
  max-width: 500px;
  width: 100%;
}

.coming-soon-text {
  font-size: 2rem;
  font-weight: 500;
  color: var(--ink-muted, #52526a);
  margin: 0;
  font-style: italic;
}

@media (max-width: 768px) {
  .coming-soon-box {
    padding: 3rem 2rem;
  }

  .coming-soon-text {
    font-size: 1.5rem;
  }
}
</style>
```
